ratified_semantic_evolutions: All-unattributed / zero-attributed download runs classify as ERROR (not partial) -- Direction-A-safe supersession of the original AC-FM-B repro expectation (Dean-approved); cutoff frozen so Retry re-lists the same window.
computeDownloadOutcome remaining===1 boundary is deliberately conservative (unattributed consumes the last slot -> error/succeeded:0; AC-FM-D wins over reserve-at-least-one) (Dean-approved).
